name: The Reluctant Seal
setup: A precursor seal, intact, and the purpose-shadow on it reads PRISON rather than vault. It is not locked so much as decided. Probing it is permitted; opening it is a different question and a worse one.
hintTiers: The seam does not respond to force, pressure, or heat. It responded, once, to being addressed.
The shadow on it is not decoration — it is a label, and it was left by someone who expected to be read.
It can be opened. Everything about how it was made is an argument that it should not be.
